findings.description: The knowledge file documents placeholder lists and default formats only for SqlPStatement#retrieve (s13–s14) and SqlPStatement#execute (s15–s16), but the source's app-log.properties configuration table explicitly defines six additional format properties: sqlLogFormatter.startExecuteQueryFormat, sqlLogFormatter.endExecuteQueryFormat, sqlLogFormatter.startExecuteUpdateFormat, sqlLogFormatter.endExecuteUpdateFormat, sqlLogFormatter.startExecuteBatchFormat, sqlLogFormatter.endExecuteBatchFormat. The full source document has corresponding placeholder-list and default-format subsections for each of these methods (mirroring the pattern of s13–s16). The knowledge file is entirely missing the placeholder tables and default format strings for SqlPStatement#executeQuery (start/end), SqlPStatement#executeUpdate (start/end), and SqlPStatement#executeBatch (start/end).
findings.source_evidence: app-log.propertiesの設定例 lists 10 sqlLogFormatter.* properties including startExecuteQueryFormat, endExecuteQueryFormat, startExecuteUpdateFormat, endExecuteUpdateFormat, startExecuteBatchFormat, endExecuteBatchFormat. The output-item sections s7–s12 confirm these six method phases exist in the source. The placeholder sections for executeQuery/executeUpdate/executeBatch are absent from the knowledge file.

findings.location: index entry s14 (SqlPStatement#retrieveメソッドの検索終了時 プレースホルダ)
findings.description: The hints for s14 are missing "$methodName$". The source placeholder table for this section lists $methodName$ as the first placeholder.
findings.source_evidence: Source placeholder table for SqlPStatement#retrieveメソッドの検索終了時: メソッド名 → $methodName$, 実行時間 → $executeTime$, データ取得時間 → $retrieveTime$, 検索件数 → $count$
